message:
feat(output): add CLIError system with remediation hints (ntm-952.2.1)

Implement a comprehensive CLI error formatting system that provides
structured, actionable error messages following the "what failed, why,
and what to do next" pattern.

New CLIError struct with fluent API:
- Message: What failed
- Cause: Why it failed (optional)
- Hint: Fastest command/action to fix it (optional)
- Code: Error code for programmatic handling (optional)

Features:
- Theme-aware color output using lipgloss (Error=red, Cause=subtext, Hint=info)
- Respects NO_COLOR env var and non-terminal stderr for accessibility
- Dual-mode output: formatted text to stderr, or JSON to stdout
- Pre-defined hints for common scenarios (session not found, tmux not
  installed, pane not found, config issues, agent errors)
- Factory functions for frequent error types (SessionNotFoundError,
  SessionExistsError, TmuxNotInstalledError, PaneNotFoundError)
- Extended ErrorResponse schema with Hint field for JSON mode

New functions:
- NewCLIError, WithCause, WithHint, WithCode (fluent builders)
- FormatCLIError (theme-aware string formatting)
- PrintCLIError, PrintCLIErrorOrJSON (output helpers)
- PrintErrorWithHint, PrintErrorFull, FatalWithHint (convenience)
- NewErrorWithHint, NewErrorFull (JSON response constructors)

Test coverage:
- CLIError creation and method chaining
- Plain text and color output formatting
- JSON mode serialization with all fields
- Factory functions for common error types
- Hint constants validation

This provides the infrastructure for standardizing error output across
all CLI commands per the Premium UX Polish epic (ntm-952).
